LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF JENNY MATSUI'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT. HAVING REVIEWED PLAINTIFF'S SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF AND THE DECLARATIONS PROVIDING THE ADDITIONAL INFORMATION REQUESTED ON JANUARY 14, 2020, THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF JENNY MATSUI'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT. ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2020 Off Calendar

Final Settlement Approval Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-26-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: Final Settlement Approval Hearing is Off calendar as duplicate entry. (302/RBU)

Plaintiff'S Notice Of And Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Jun-26-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. ALEXEI KUCHINSKY, Esq. of Kuchinsky Law Office (Tel: 415-930-9072) appearing via CourtCall for plaintiff Jenny Matsui;
Atty. ELIZABETH T. FERGUSON, Esq. of Bartko Zankel Bunzel & Miller (Tel: 415-291-4526) appearing via CourtCall for defendant Chinese Hospital Association.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF JENNY MATSUI'S Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement

Matter was not contested or argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff's motion for final approval of class settlement is granted. Of the 143 putative class members to whom notices were mailed, none objected or filed a gross wage dispute, and three opted out.

If in proper form, the Court will sign plaintiff's proposed order and proposed judgment.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2020 Continued To Aug-05-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2020 Continued To Apr-29-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff Jenny Matsui'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Feb-06-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Jenny Matsui'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement.

Having reviewed plaintiff's supplemental brief and the declarations providing the additional information requested on January 14, 2020, the court grants plaintiff Jenny Matsui's motion for preliminary approval of class action settlement.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

MOTION - Notice And Plaintiffs Unopposed Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Jan-14-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Alexei Kuchinsky, Esq. and William Klein, Esq. of KLEIN LAW GROUP LLP, T:415.693.9107, for plaintiff/moving party;
An Ruda, Esq. of BARTKO ZANKEL BUNZEL & MILLER, T:415.291.4534, for defendant.

RULING: Parties appeared in compliance with the tentative ruling. After hearing, the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Jenny Matsui's motion for preliminary approval of class action settlement is denied without prejudice.

[See word minutes for the Court's full ruling.]

A further hearing on PLAINTIFF JENNY MATSUI'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement is set for February 6, 2020 at 9:30am in Department 302. To address the Court's concerns raised in the tentative ruling, supplemental briefs and declarations shall be filed by the parties no later than January 31, 2020.

Additionally, defendant's Motion To Seal shall also be set for February 6, 2020 at 9:30am in Department 302.

Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-23-2019 Continued To Feb-26-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
